title: Phenol-chloroform DNA extraction from Sporosarcina pasteurii
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"c5814","text":"This protocol is for extraction of genomic DNA from Sporosarcina pasteurii. It is based on a standard phenol-chloroform DNA extraction method.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":52,"length":22}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"1ut9k","text":"All steps should be performed in a chemical fume hood.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"cm3sr","text":"•\tBrain-heart infusion (BHI) broth supplemented with 330 mM urea","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7ibgc","text":"•\tResuspension buffer (50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 10% sucrose)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"92b02","text":"•\tLysis buffer (Tris pH 8.0, 10 mg/mL lysozyme)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bs6kc","text":"•\t10% sodium dodecyl sulfate (SDS)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"41dhq","text":"•\t100 mg/mL RNase A","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aam6m","text":"•\t50 mg/mL proteinase K","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2bc26","text":"•\t3.0 M sodium acetate, pH 5.5","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9sj2d","text":"•\t100% ethanol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"57bu5","text":"•\tTE buffer (10 mM Tris, 1 mM EDTA, pH 8.0)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9530s","text":"•\tPhenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (25:24:1, saturated with 10mM Tris, pH 8.0, 1mM EDTA)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6381d","text":"•\tChloroform","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"39o5n","text":"•\t70% ethanol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Grow Sporosarcina pasteurii cells in 150 mL of BHI/330 mM urea at 30°C with 200 rpm shaking to an OD600 of 3.5.
Concentrate cells by centrifugation at 15,000 x g for 10 min and pour off the supernatant.
Resuspend cells in 10 mL of Resuspension Buffer (50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 10% sucrose).
Add 2.5 mL Lysis Buffer (Tris pH 8.0, 10 mg/mL lysozyme), 1.5 mL 10% SDS, 5 µL 100 mg/mL RNase A, and 25 µL 50 mg/mL proteinase K to lyse cells and stabilize DNA.
Add 1.3 mL of 3.0 M sodium acetate (pH 5.5) and 30 mL of 100% ethanol to separate DNA from other biomacromolecules by precipitation.
Spool DNA onto a glass hook and transfer to 20 mL of TE buffer.
Dissolve DNA in TE buffer for 1 h at 37°C.
Add a 5 mL aliquot of DNA to 7 mL of phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (25:24:1, Saturated with 10mM Tris, pH 8.0, 1mM EDTA) and mix by inversion.
Separate phases by centrifugation at 10,000 x g for 10 min.
Pipette off the aqueous phase and add to 5 mL of chloroform. Mix by vortexing.
Separate phases by centrifugation at 10,000 x g for 10 min.
Pipette off the aqueous phase and add to 30 mL of 100 % ethanol. Mix by inversion.
Collect precipitated DNA by centrifugation at 10,000 x g for 10 min.
Wash pelleted DNA twice by adding 5 mL of 70% ethanol, mixing by inversion, centrifuging at 10,000 x g for 5 min, and removing the supernatant.
Dissolve the final pellet in 500 µL of TE buffer at 37°C for 1 h.
creator: Matthew J. Tuttle
